reviewedAreas: candidate identity and public manifest consistency
current-main consumption of frozen source bundles
source bundle manifest, ready-lock and content-hash verification
removal of source-commit equality from build and release verification
candidate binding to source bundle content identity
nonBlockingObservations: Compatibility is intentionally determined by running the current code against the frozen bundle under CACHE_ONLY/DATA_PACKAGE_STRICT/VALIDATION_STRICT. No explicit source-contract version is introduced in this candidate.
notes: The previous documentation blocker is closed. Data Build is now documented and implemented as consuming a verified frozen Source Bundle with the current main code; the acquisition commit is retained only for traceability and no longer participates in checkout or commit-equality gates.
